---
title: "Current Conditions"
---

Welcome to the the Lake Ormstrup (Ormstrup Sø) water temperature forecast dashboard. Forecasts are generated by the Virginia Tech Center for Ecosystem Forecasting ([CEF](https://www.ecoforecast.centers.vt.edu/)) in collaboration with Aarhus University partners.

```{r setup, include=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.width= '300px', out.height= '150px'}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)
library(leaflet)
library(oce)

```

![](vt_cef.jpg){fig-align="center" width="40%"}

Disclaimer: The data provided on this page are experimental.

```{r, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)

obs_cleaned <- arrow::open_csv_dataset(arrow::s3_bucket('bio230121-bucket01/flare/targets/ORMS/', endpoint_override = 'renc.osn.xsede.org', anonymous = TRUE)) |>
  dplyr::filter(is.na(inflow_name)) |>
  collect() |>
  lubridate::with_tz(datetime, tzone = "Europe/Paris")

obs_updated <- max(obs_cleaned$datetime,na.rm = TRUE)

```

## Most recent forecast

```{r}
## WATER TEMPERATURE
interest_var <- 'temperature'
interest_site <- 'ORMS'
day_range <- 14

s3 <- arrow::open_dataset(arrow::s3_bucket('bio230121-bucket01/flare/forecasts/parquet/site_id=ORMS', endpoint_override = 'amnh1.osn.xsede.org', anonymous = TRUE))

ref_date <- s3 |> distinct(reference_datetime) |> 
  filter(reference_datetime == max(reference_datetime)) |> 
  collect() |> 
  pull(reference_datetime)

forecast <- s3 |> 
  filter(reference_datetime == ref_date,
         variable == "temperature") |> 
  lubridate::with_tz(datetime, tzone = "Europe/Paris") |> 
  lubridate::with_tz(reference_datetime, tzone = "Europe/Paris")
  collect()

ggplot(forecast = aes(x = datetime, y = prediction, group = parameter)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = reference_datetime))
```

## Probability of Mixing

```{r}

prob_mix <- forecast |>
  select(reference_datetime, datetime, depth, parameter, prediction) |>
  filter(depth %in% c(0.5, 5.0)) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = depth, values_from = prediction) |>
  mutate(mixed = ifelse(abs(`0.5` - `5`) < 1.0, 1, 0)) |>
  group_by(datetime, reference_datetime) |>
  summarize(prob_mix = sum(mixed)/ n(), .groups = "drop_last")

ggplot(prob_mix, aes(x = datetime, y = prob_mix)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = reference_datetime)) +
  theme_bw()

```


Page last updated on `r Sys.Date()`
